title: Campaigns against the Byzantines
description: In this year, Muhammad b. Marwan campaigned during the summer and defeated the Byzantines. `Uthman b. al-Walid's attack 832. A]- Mushaqqar was an ancient fortress in al-Bahrayn. See Yaqut, Mu`jam, s.v.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
